transcript: Speaker A: Bhai boss la bolchaya mala udya chhutti pahije, pan professional English madhe kasa liyu? [Brother, I want to tell the boss that I need a holiday tomorrow, but how do I write it in professional English?] Speaker B: Simple aahe. I would like to request a leave of absence for tomorrow. [It's simple. I would like to request a leave of absence for tomorrow.] Speaker A: Arey waah! Tujhi English achanak kevadi kashi jhali? [Wow! How did your English suddenly get so good?] Speaker B: SpeakX mule. Yaat Marathi instructions sobat AI teacher roj practice karto. Mi roj 10 minute bolun practice karto. Tu pan theory sod ani practically bolayla suru kar. [Because of SpeakX. In this, along with Marathi instructions, the AI teacher practices daily. I practice speaking for 10 minutes daily. You also leave theory and start speaking practically.]
on_screen_text: Bhai boss la bolchaya [Brother, I want to tell the boss] mala udya chhutti pahije [I need a holiday tomorrow] pan professional English [but professional English] madhe kasa liyu [how to write in] Simple aahe [It's simple] I would like to request a leave of absence for tomorrow Arey waah [Wow] tujhi english achanak [your english suddenly] kevadi kashi jhali [how did it get so good] SpeakX instructions sobat [with instructions] mi roj 10 minute [I daily 10 minutes] bolun practice karto [practice by speaking] tu pan theory sod [you also leave theory] ani practically [and practically] bolayla suru kar [start speaking] Speak english naturally SpeakX Download now
summary: A man asks his friend how to professionally request a day off from his boss in English. The friend provides a polished translation and credits his improved English to practicing 10 minutes daily on the SpeakX app, which features Marathi instructions and an AI teacher.
